habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Capsize (Ex) A hippopotamus can overturn a boat of its size or smaller by ramming it as a charge attack and making a CMB check. The DC of this check is 25 or the result of the boat captain's Profession (sailor) check, whichever is higher.  Sweat (Ex) A hippo's reddish sweat protects it from nonlethal damage from hot environments, and grants it a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against nonmagical disease.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Capsize (Ex) A hippopotamus can overturn a boat of its size or smaller by ramming it as a charge attack and making a CMB check. The DC of this check is 25 or the result of the boat captain's Profession (sailor) check, whichever is higher.  Sweat (Ex) A hippo's reddish sweat protects it from nonlethal damage from hot environments, and grants it a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against nonmagical disease.

fullStatBlock:
CR 5
Hippopotamus
N Large animal
Init +4
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +8
AC 17, touch 9, flat-footed 17 (+8 natural, -1 size)
hp 59 (7d8+28)
Fort +8, Ref +5, Will +3
Speed 40 ft.
Melee bite +8 (2d8+6)
Special Attacks capsize, trample (1d8+6, DC 17)
Special Abilities Capsize (Ex) A hippopotamus can overturn a boat of its size or smaller by ramming it as a charge attack and making a CMB check. The DC of this check is 25 or the result of the boat captain's Profession (sailor) check, whichever is higher.  Sweat (Ex) A hippo's reddish sweat protects it from nonlethal damage from hot environments, and grants it a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against nonmagical disease.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 19, Dex 10, Con 16, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 5
Base Atk +5; CMB +10; CMD 20
Feats Endurance, Improved Initiative, Power Attack, Skill Focus (Perception)
Skills Perception +8, Stealth +1 (+11 underwater), Swim +11
Environment  warm rivers
Organization solitary, pair, or bloat (3-20)
Treasure none
Defensive Abilities sweat
Source PFRPG Bestiary 2
